commit.message:
feat(site): Just the Docs theme, domain guides, workflow recipes

- Switch _config.yml to just-the-docs/just-the-docs@v0.10.0 remote theme
- Add index.md as Jekyll homepage (README.md stays for GitHub.com viewers)
- Add experiments/index.md: AX/RX/DX summary with reproduce instructions
- Add domains/index.md + 5 domain guides: FINTECH, ML, GAME, CREATIVE, CLI
  - Each covers: active gates, domain-specific gate targets, verification strategy, spec patterns
  - AI-rubric evaluation type introduced in CREATIVE guide (RM-054 design)
- Add docs/recipes/index.md + 8 workflow recipes:
  - new-project-with-spec, new-project-no-spec, post-setup-first-cycle
  - brownfield-new-feature, bug-fix, migration, project-takeover, post-hardening
  - All reference forgecraft_actions tool with exact action names
  - Full TDD cycle, cascade, close_cycle, start_hardening steps included

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: export-ADData
repository.description: export-ADData is a flexible PowerShell toolkit for exporting and importing Active Directory accounts. Easily convert AD data to CSV and back, with advanced import features for cross-domain migration, OU reorganization, granular mapping, and robust validation. Ideal for admins managing AD at scale.

commit.message:
Modernize website: deps, typography, tagline, accessibility, animations

- Upgrade Bootstrap 5.1→5.3.8, Bootstrap Icons 1.7→1.13.1
- Remove jQuery and Font Awesome; SoundCloud icon replaced with inline SVG
- Add Quicksand font from Google Fonts for heading and tagline
- Add tagline: Christian · software engineer · Durham, NC
- Add Open Graph meta tags and SEO meta description
- Add aria-label on all icon links for accessibility
- Add fade-in animation with staggered delays
- Add smooth hover transitions with scale effect on icons
- Merge icons into single row with responsive 2-row fallback on mobile
- Increase icon size and spacing; set Quicksand on tooltips

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Cloudinary image size URLs showing undefined in Media collection (#455)

* Initial plan

* fix: use Cloudinary transform URLs for image sizes instead of uploading separate files

The generateFileURL callback now uses the size parameter to build
Cloudinary transformation URLs (c_fill,w_320,h_240) for sized variants
(thumbnail, card, hero) instead of trying to reference separate uploads
that don't exist. The adapter skips uploading sized variants and copies
the original public ID into each size's filename field.

Co-authored-by: tjnicolaides <1401894+tjnicolaides@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: Claude for Desktop MCP setup — mcp-remote, all 3 OSes

- Replace old Claude Desktop section (which used type:http, no longer
  supported) with a step-by-step mcp-remote guide
- Step 1: npm install -g mcp-remote
- Step 2: per-OS config examples (macOS, Windows, Linux) with
  NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED env var for self-signed cert bypass
- Add Linux config file path (~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json)
- Explain why the env var is needed and how to use which mcp-remote
  to find the correct command path
- Note Windows cmd path fallback

Build complete .NET 9 WPF Steam Server Management application

- SteamServerTool.Core (net9.0): Models and Services class library
  - ServerConfig, RconConfig, ScheduledRconCommand models with camelCase JSON
  - ServerManager: start/stop/restart, crash detection, config load/save
  - BackupService: timestamped zip backup/restore/prune
  - SteamCmdService: steamcmd wrapper for install/update
  - RconClient: Source Engine RCON TCP protocol implementation
- SteamServerTool (net9.0-windows WPF): Main application
  - DarkTheme.xaml matching Arbiter VS Code dark palette
  - Full MainWindow with toolbar, server sidebar, tabbed detail panel
  - Overview/Config/Mods/Backups/Console/Logs tabs
  - Status indicator dots (green/yellow/red/amber)
  - DispatcherTimer-based real-time status refresh
  - RCON console with connect/disconnect/send
  - Operation log panel at bottom
- SteamServerTool.Tests (net9.0): xUnit test suite
  - 29 tests covering ServerConfig validation and ServerManager
  - All tests pass

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(notifications): color-code category sections to match summary cards

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(white-paper): close two remaining linguistic attack surfaces

1. Abstract/body: 'what Chomsky classifies as context-sensitive reading'
   -> 'what Chomsky's hierarchy classifies as context-sensitive'
   Chomsky classifies grammars and languages, not reading acts.

2. §4.2: Add usage note that syntactic/semantic are used in the
   programming-language sense throughout, not the formal linguistics
   sense. Closes the gap for any linguist who would object to the
   borrowed terminology being used with different referents.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: ClientActionForm re-throws Next.js redirect errors instead of treating as failures

ClientActionForm was catching this and showing an error toast before the navigation
            {                 echo ___BEGIN___COMMAND_OUTPUT_MARKER___;                 PS1=;PS2=;unset HISTFILE;                 EC=0;                 echo ___BEGIN___COMMAND_DONE_MARKER___0;             }   '''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''' issue.

Fix: import isRedirectError and re-throw redirect errors in the catch block so
the navigation proceeds cleanly without triggering the error toast.

Initial commit: Capybara Snake game

A snake game with capybara body segments, gold capybaras, raccoon/wombat enemies,
beaver events, rainstorms, gold orange powerup with bullet shooting, and vacuum mechanic.

commit.message:
Implement authentication and authorisation backend (Identity + JWT) (#130)

* Initial plan

* feat: implement authentication backend with Identity models and Cosmos stores

- Add BlendUser, BlendRole, ExternalLoginInfo domain models in Blend.Domain/Identity
- Add CosmosUserStore implementing IUserStore, IUserPasswordStore, IUserEmailStore,
  IUserLoginStore, IUserRoleStore backed by IRepository<BlendUser>
- Add CosmosRoleStore implementing IRoleStore with in-memory predefined roles
- Register IRepository<BlendUser> in CosmosServiceExtensions for the 'users' container
- Add Microsoft.Extensions.Identity.Core 9.0.3 package to Blend.Infrastructure

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Implement complete authentication API layer

- Add RefreshToken domain entity (Blend.Domain)
- Add JwtOptions configuration class
- Add IJwtService/JwtService for JWT access token generation
- Add IEmailService/ConsoleEmailService for password reset emails
- Add IRefreshTokenService/InMemoryRefreshTokenService for refresh tokens
- Add auth DTOs: RegisterRequest, LoginRequest, ForgotPasswordRequest,
  ResetPasswordRequest, AuthResponse
- Add AuthServiceExtensions with AddBlendAuthentication():
  - ASP.NET Core Identity with CosmosUserStore/CosmosRoleStore (no EF)
  - JWT Bearer authentication with configurable options
  - Conditional Google, Facebook, Twitter/X OAuth providers
  - Authorization policies: RequireAuthenticated, RequireAdmin
  - Rate limiting: fixed window 10 req/min per IP on auth endpoints
- Add AuthController with endpoints:
  POST /api/v1/auth/register
  POST /api/v1/auth/login
  POST /api/v1/auth/login/{provider} (external OAuth)
  GET  /api/v1/auth/callback/{provider}
  POST /api/v1/auth/refresh (HttpOnly cookie-based)
  POST /api/v1/auth/logout
  POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password
  POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password
- Update Program.cs: replace placeholder auth with AddBlendAuthentication()
  and add UseRateLimiter() middleware
- Update appsettings.json: expand Jwt section, add Authentication section
  for Google/Facebook/Twitter credentials

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix code review issues: use DateTimeOffset.UtcNow in JwtService and add null guard for redirectUri in ExternalLogin

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address code review: safe token logging + Twitter OAuth claim mapping

- ConsoleEmailService: log email at Info level, token at Debug only to
  prevent accidental exposure in production log aggregators
- AuthServiceExtensions: add full Twitter OnCreatingTicket handler that
  fetches user info and maps id/name/email claims from Twitter v2 API
  response ({ data: { id, name, email } })

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(tests): add unit and integration tests for auth backend

- JwtServiceTests: token claims, expiry, issuer/audience, refresh uniqueness, Admin role
- PasswordPolicyTests: PasswordOptions config values and PasswordHasher hash/verify
- AccountEnumerationTests: controller unit tests verifying identical 401/200 responses prevent user enumeration
- RefreshTokenServiceTests: InMemoryRefreshTokenService create/get/revoke/expiry
- AuthFlowTests: integration tests with InMemoryUserStore replacing CosmosUserStore for register, login, refresh, logout, forgot-password, reset-password flows

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix DI validation: register NullBlendUserRepository fallback when Cosmos not configured

Co-authored-by: andrew-rubio <20164084+andrew-rubio@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/andrew-rubio/blend-app/sessions/c28728bd-d879-46d2-9fa6-9eab1946d83a

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: andrew-rubio <20164084+andrew-rubio@users.noreply.github.com>

Add ConnectionType to ConnectedPeer for LAN/WAN tracking

- Add top-level ConnectionType enum (lan, wan, unknown) to ConnectedPeer.swift
- Add connectionType property and parameter (default .unknown) to ConnectedPeer
- Thread connectionType through makeConnectedPeerView, registerWebRTCPeerAsConnected, connectToWorker
- Bonjour/LAN reconnect path passes .lan
- Firestore WAN paths (autoConnectWANPeers, connectToWANWorker, establishPeerSessions) pass .wan
- Incoming responder sessions infer LAN/WAN from discoveryService.discoveredPeers
- refreshConnectedWorkerCapabilities preserves existing connectionType on rebuild

commit.message:
Address code review: fix redundant check, smooth damage scaling, use userData for shield detection, use bad flag for negative rewards

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Implement 10 major gameplay system changes

1. Hard collision lock - army can't cross center wall dividers
2. Difficulty system - 2-3x enemy counts, within-segment HP scaling, higher boss HP
3. Negative choices - segments 3/4/7 have negative safe rewards forcing risk decisions
4. Weapon barrel system - collectible weapon barrels (assault/shotgun/minigun/rocket)
5. Map variation system - 5 layout patterns randomized per run
6. Army size control - soft cap 50, hard cap 100, diminishing returns
7. Companion combat fix - dragons/turrets/drones deal actual damage
8. Game variety - 6 extra segment types mixed into cycles 2+
9. Enemy variety - 4 new types (shield/jumping/ranged/charger)
10. Balance tuning - scroll speed 15, start 3 soldiers, medic 8s interval

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace old architecture with aether2 codebase

- Update README.md, aether_config.py, build_dataset.py, dataset.py, train.py
- Add probe_fields.py (new file)
- Remove omega_tokenizer.json (old architecture artifact)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Release v0.1.35

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add project context detection to agent prompt

Auto-detect project language from manifest files (go.mod, package.json,
Cargo.toml, etc.) and include it in the system prompt so the AI model
generates code in the correct language.

- New context.go: DetectProjectContext() gathers language, manifests,
  .gitignore, and file tree
- Enriched system prompt explicitly requires code in detected language
- Structured user prompt with clear sections for all context
- Replace 'git add .' with targeted staging of only planned files
- Comprehensive tests for detection, prompt building, and staging

Closes #11

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: update for MentisDB 0.5.2 — Reframe, Supersedes, cross-chain refs, bulk import

- user_docs: add Import MEMORY.md dashboard section with usage guide and
  format example; update Thought Explorer description to mention 29 types,
  positional refs (#N) and typed relations in detail modal; add sidebar link
- agent_docs: add Reframe ThoughtType card (Errors & Corrections group);
  bump type count 28 → 29; update retrieval guidance to include Reframe;
  new Thought Relations section covering Supersedes, cross-chain refs, and
  positional back-references; new Import MEMORY.md Tool section for
  mentisdb_import_memory_markdown MCP tool; update Thought Explorer
  description to show 29 types and modal relation display; add sidebar links
- developer_docs: bump crate version 0.4 → 0.5 and docs.rs link to 0.5.2;
  add import-markdown row to REST API table; new Schema Version section
  (MENTISDB_SCHEMA_V2, transparent legacy migration); new Bulk Import API
  section (MentisDb::import_from_memory_markdown, REST, MCP, dashboard
  endpoints); new Thought Relations section (ThoughtInput builder,
  with_cross_chain_relation, Supersedes kind); add sidebar nav links

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
